start.text: Welcome to the dojo. I hope you came here to train, not just to gawk.

choices.text: I want to learn martial arts!

train.text: Good spirit! But training is not about fighting. It is about discipline, respect, and knowing yourself. *strikes a practice pose* Come, show me your form.

impress.text: *smiles modestly* It is nothing fancy. Just a roof, some mats, and the will to improve. The real beauty is in the students who train here.

choices.text: You must be a great teacher.

poetry.text: *blushes and crosses arms* Who told you that?! I... I just write sometimes. It is nothing. *looks away* Fine, I will share one: The cherry falls not because the wind blows, but because it chooses to let go.

clumsy.text: *catches your wrist gently* Not bad for a beginner. But you lead with your shoulder. Try again. *adjusts your stance* There. Much better.

bow.text: *eyes widen with respect* You understand. The bow is the most important move in any martial art. It shows you are ready to learn. *bows back deeply* I will teach you well.

choices.text: I will do my best, sensei.

end_happy.text: Come back anytime. The dojo is always open to those who seek growth. *nods firmly*

end_best.text: *looks at you with warmth* You are different from most people I meet. Perhaps... we will become good friends. *rubs the back of his neck awkwardly* Do not tell anyone about the poetry.
